scripts.deploy: npm run build && CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN=$(security find-generic-password -a openclaw -s op-connect-token -w | xargs -I{} node -e "const r=require('child_process');const t=r.execSync('curl -s -H Authorization: Bearer {} http://localhost:8080/v1/vaults/jzi6igkxfanitosao62kpxirfy/items/qtvqojqabjzypqquuqi4ceknby').toString();const d=JSON.parse(t);console.log(d.fields.find(f=>f.label==='API token').value)") && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name health-app-prototype --branch main
